body:
## Rationale

**🟡 MEDIUM batch — proven comparison format + active GSC/GA4 entities**

All 3 pairs are genuinely absent from the 54 live comparison pairs in `drummerComparisons.js`. Each pair has distinct editorial framing and serves a documented query cluster.

Dedup check against open proposals: #2890 (batch 30) proposes Abe/John + Charlie/Bill + Scott/Nicko — none overlap with this batch. Confirmed clear vs all 54 live pairs.

## Pairs

### 1. tomas-haake-vs-blake-richardson
**Angle:** Rhythm architects — Meshuggah's polymetric grid vs BTBAM's progressive chaos. Serves the "most complex metal drummers" LLM query. Haake has multiple open GSC queries (14+ impressions); Richardson just gained a lick page (batch 16 proposal). Haake already has 7 existing pairs (most of any drummer), making him a natural hub.

### 2. shannon-larkin-vs-jay-weinberg
**Angle:** The arena rock metal succession — Larkin (Godsmack, GA4 top-8) vs Weinberg (Slipknot successor, 5 GSC impr). Both represent "face of a major metal band's live show" drumming style. Natural LLM query: "Who drums for Slipknot vs Godsmack now?" Shannon has NO existing comparison pairs in the DB (0/54). This is the first Shannon pair.

### 3. flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias
**Angle:** Ultimate tech-death speed battle — Cryptopsy vs Nile. Mounier = #1 GSC CTR entity (42.86%). Kollias = consistent GSC signal (4-7 impr). LLM anchor: "Who is faster, Flo Mounier or George Kollias?" — one of the most common tech-death forum debates, highly LLM-citable. Neither `flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias` nor `george-kollias-vs-flo-mounier` exist in DB.

## Template / data shape

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js`

Add 3 entries following the existing pattern:
```js
{
  drummer1Id: 'tomas-haake',
  drummer2Id: 'blake-richardson',
  category: 'rhythmic-complexity',  // check existing categories
},
{
  drummer1Id: 'shannon-larkin',
  drummer2Id: 'jay-weinberg',
  category: 'nu-metal-rock',  // or 'arena-metal'
},
{
  drummer1Id: 'flo-mounier',
  drummer2Id: 'george-kollias',
  category: 'technical-death-metal',
},
```

**LLM files to create** (follow existing pattern in `public/llms/comparisons/`):
- `flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias.md`
- `shannon-larkin-vs-jay-weinberg.md`
- `tomas-haake-vs-blake-richardson.md`

## Expected page count

3 comparison pages + 3 LLM files = **6 new indexable URLs**

## Quality gate

Per existing comparison format:
- ≥300 words per comparison page
- At least 3 head-to-head dimension sections (speed, technique, gear, influence)
- FAQPage schema with ≥3 Q&As
- Internal links to each drummer's profile page + at least 1 album article per drummer
- Schema.org/Person markup for both drummers

## Estimated uplift

Serves: tech-death speed comparison queries (Flo/Kollias), arena metal succession queries (Larkin/Weinberg), rhythmic complexity comparisons (Haake/Richardson). All 3 serve documented GSC query clusters.

## GSC source query

- Flo cluster: "flo mounier drum kit" 42.86% CTR
- Haake cluster: multiple polymetric/Meshuggah queries 14+ impr
- Shannon: GA4 top-8 page signal

## Verify

1. All 3 comparison pages render at `/compare/<slug>`
2. All 3 LLM comparison files return 200 at `/llms/comparisons/<slug>.md`
3. Each page has ≥300 words, FAQPage schema, ≥3 internal links
4. No duplicate slug with existing 54 pairs
5. `/drummer/shannon-larkin` and `/drummer/flo-mounier` pages link to their new comparison pages

## Done

- [ ] 3 pairs added to `drummerComparisons.js`
- [ ] 3 LLM comparison files created
- [ ] All 3 pages render correctly
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison pairs batch 31 — tomas-haake-vs-blake-richardson + shannon-larkin-vs-jay-weinberg + flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
